title: Runtime guardrails and backoff ladder
goal: Detect degeneration and apply safe backoff transitions within a single request.
constraints: Backoff applies only to active request context.
Emit telemetry for each backoff step.
definition_of_done: Guardrail fixtures trigger expected backoff sequence.
Final metadata reflects post-backoff active layers.
Fallback to no-steering mode is supported.
rollback_note: If guardrails are overly aggressive, revert to monitor-only mode while preserving telemetry emission.
